description: Individual AF Teacher Interaction — per-teacher binary checklist action type with attendance gating, all-teachers enforcement, and visit completion rule change (all 3 action types required). Before you start on the story, read docs/ai/project-context.md for overall project's context.

userStories.title: Config, types, and validation foundation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the action type registered, config defined, and validation functions created so the backend can accept and validate individual teacher interaction data.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `individual_af_teacher_interaction: "Individual AF Teacher Interaction"` to `ACTION_TYPES` in `src/lib/visit-actions.ts`
Update exhaustiveness test in `src/lib/visit-actions.test.ts`: add `individual_af_teacher_interaction: true` to Record, change `toHaveLength(9)` to `toHaveLength(10)`

Create new file `src/lib/individual-af-teacher-interaction.ts` following `src/lib/af-team-interaction.ts` pattern with: ATTENDANCE_OPTIONS (`present`, `on_leave`, `absent`), config with 5 sections and 13 questions (oh_class_duration, st_grade11_syllabus, st_grade11_testing, st_grade12_syllabus, st_grade12_testing, sp_student_performance, sp_girls_performance, sn_academics, sn_school_operations, sn_co_curriculars, mp_monthly_plan, mp_classroom_observations, mp_student_feedback), allQuestionKeys, IndividualTeacherEntry and IndividualAFTeacherInteractionData interfaces, validateIndividualTeacherSave (lenient), validateIndividualTeacherComplete (strict). See implementation plan Phase 1.3 for full spec.

Add `individual_af_teacher_interaction` entry to `ACTION_FORM_CONFIGS` in `src/components/visits/ActionDetailForm.tsx` with title 'Individual AF Teacher Interaction Details', description, and `fields: []`
`npx tsc --noEmit` passes with zero errors
`npm run test` — all tests pass (including updated visit-actions exhaustiveness test)
userStories.notes: MUST add ACTION_TYPES entry and ACTION_FORM_CONFIGS entry atomically (TypeScript Record<ActionType, ...> breaks otherwise). Reference implementation plan Phase 1.1-1.5. Reference `src/lib/af-team-interaction.ts` for validation pattern.

userStories.title: Validation unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need comprehensive tests for the config and validation functions to catch regressions and document expected behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Create new file `src/lib/individual-af-teacher-interaction.test.ts` following `src/lib/af-team-interaction.test.ts` pattern
Config integrity tests (~3): 5 sections with correct titles, 13 total unique question keys (1+4+2+3+3), allQuestionKeys matches flattened sections

Lenient validation tests (~15): accepts empty `{}`, partial teachers, teacher with on_leave/absent and no questions, present with partial questions, fully valid mixed payload; rejects unknown top-level keys, non-boolean answer, non-string remark, non-array teachers, missing id, non-positive-integer ID, duplicate IDs, invalid attendance, non-object data (null/string/array)

Strict validation tests (~8): rejects empty `{}` (missing teachers), empty teachers array, present teacher missing questions, present teacher with null answers; accepts absent/on_leave without questions, fully complete mixed payload; reports teacher name and question labels in errors
All ~26 tests pass: `npx vitest run src/lib/individual-af-teacher-interaction.test.ts`
`npm run test` — full suite passes
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 1.4 for complete test case list. Follow `src/lib/af-team-interaction.test.ts` for test structure and patterns.

userStories.title: PATCH route validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the PATCH API route to validate individual teacher interaction data so invalid data cannot be saved.
acceptanceCriteria: Import `validateIndividualTeacherSave` and `validateIndividualTeacherComplete` from `@/lib/individual-af-teacher-interaction` in `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/route.ts`
Add validation block after the `af_team_interaction` block: use lenient validation for in_progress, strict for completed status
Return `apiError(422, 'Invalid individual teacher interaction data', validation.errors)` on failure
`npx tsc --noEmit` passes
Existing PATCH route tests still pass: `npx vitest run src/app/api/pm/visits/\[id\]/actions/\[actionId\]/route.test.ts`
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 2.1. Follow exact same pattern as the existing `af_team_interaction` validation block in the same file.

userStories.title: END route validation with all-teachers DB check
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the END API route to validate data shape AND verify all school teachers are recorded before allowing the action to end.
acceptanceCriteria: Import `validateIndividualTeacherComplete` from `@/lib/individual-af-teacher-interaction` in `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/end/route.ts`
Add `individualTeacherValidationError(action)` function mirroring `classroomValidationError`/`afTeamValidationError` pattern

Add `allTeachersRecordedError(action, schoolCode, schoolRegion)` async function that queries `user_permission` for all teachers at the school (same SQL as `GET /api/pm/teachers`: `school_codes @> ARRAY[$1]::TEXT[]` — columns are TEXT[] not JSONB), compares recorded teacher IDs against DB, returns apiError with missing teacher names if any are missing
Wire both validation functions in the pre-update path AND concurrent-fallback path (same 2 places as existing validations)
Pass `visit.school_code` and `visit.school_region` (both available from `loadVisitAccessTarget()`) to `allTeachersRecordedError()`
`npx tsc --noEmit` passes
Existing END route tests still pass: `npx vitest run src/app/api/pm/visits/\[id\]/actions/\[actionId\]/end/route.test.ts`
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 2.2. IMPORTANT: school_codes and regions columns are TEXT[] arrays, NOT JSONB — use ARRAY[$1]::TEXT[] containment. The `visit.school_region` comes from the LEFT JOIN on school table in loadVisitAccessTarget().

userStories.title: Visit completion rule change — require all 3 action types
userStories.description: As a product owner, I need visit completion to require all 3 action types (classroom observation, AF team interaction, individual AF teacher interaction).
acceptanceCriteria: In `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/complete/route.ts`, find the existing completion check that requires classroom_observation
Add check for `af_team_interaction`: at least one completed action of this type, else return error 'At least one completed AF Team Interaction is required'
Add check for `individual_af_teacher_interaction`: at least one completed action of this type, else return error 'At least one completed Individual AF Teacher Interaction is required'
Checks are sequential — short-circuit on first missing type (classroom observation first, then AF team, then individual teacher), matching existing route pattern
`npx tsc --noEmit` passes
NOTE: existing COMPLETE route tests WILL break — that is expected and fixed in US-008
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 2.3. This is a confirmed product decision — no visits exist on production yet. Existing tests that complete visits with only classroom observation will fail; they are updated in US-008.

userStories.title: PATCH route unit tests for individual teacher interaction
userStories.description: As a developer, I need unit tests for PATCH route validation of individual teacher interaction data.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ~7 new tests to `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/route.test.ts`
Test: lenient accepts empty `{}` data for in-progress individual_af_teacher_interaction action (200)
Test: lenient accepts partial data with 1 teacher and partial questions (200)
Test: lenient accepts teacher with attendance 'absent' and no questions (200)
Test: lenient rejects unknown top-level keys (422)
Test: lenient rejects invalid attendance value (422)
Test: strict rejects incomplete data on completed action — admin edit (422)
Test: strict accepts fully complete data on completed action — admin (200)
All tests pass: `npx vitest run src/app/api/pm/visits/\[id\]/actions/\[actionId\]/route.test.ts`
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 2.4. Follow existing test patterns in the file — create action with action_type='individual_af_teacher_interaction', mock DB query returns, etc.

userStories.title: END route unit tests for individual teacher interaction
userStories.description: As a developer, I need unit tests for END route validation including the all-teachers DB check.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ~6 new tests to `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/end/route.test.ts`
Test: 422 when individual_af_teacher_interaction data is incomplete (missing answers for present teacher)
Test: 422 when data is null/malformed
Test: 422 when not all school teachers are recorded (mock teacher query to return more teachers than in data)
Test: ends successfully when all teachers recorded with valid data
Test: absent/on_leave teachers pass without questions
Test: concurrent fallback path also validates
All tests pass: `npx vitest run src/app/api/pm/visits/\[id\]/actions/\[actionId\]/end/route.test.ts`
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 2.5. Must mock the teacher query (user_permission query for school teachers) to return a known set of teacher IDs.

userStories.title: COMPLETE route unit tests — update for 3-type requirement
userStories.description: As a developer, I need COMPLETE route tests updated for the new rule requiring all 3 action types, and new tests added to verify the rule.
acceptanceCriteria: Update ALL existing successful completion test mocks in `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/complete/route.test.ts` to include completed actions of all 3 types (classroom_observation + af_team_interaction + individual_af_teacher_interaction)
Test: visit fails completion with only classroom_observation (no AF team, no individual teacher) — 422 mentioning missing type
Test: visit fails completion with classroom_observation + af_team_interaction but no individual_af_teacher_interaction — 422
Test: visit completes successfully with all 3 completed action types — 200
Test: error message mentions the first missing action type (short-circuit pattern)
Update test name at ~line 362 that says 'AF team interaction is supplementary' to reflect new rule
All tests pass: `npx vitest run src/app/api/pm/visits/\[id\]/complete/route.test.ts`
`npm run test` — full suite passes (this is the gate — all broken tests should now be fixed)
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 2.6. This is the biggest test impact — many existing tests need updated mocks. Use `buildCompleteAFTeamInteractionData()` from `src/lib/af-team-interaction.ts` pattern and create similar builder for individual teacher interaction data in the test file.

userStories.title: Enable in action type picker
userStories.description: As a PM, I want to see 'Individual AF Teacher Interaction' as a selectable option in the action type picker.
acceptanceCriteria: In `src/components/visits/ActionTypePickerModal.tsx`, update the `enabled` check to include `individual_af_teacher_interaction` alongside `classroom_observation` and `af_team_interaction`
Update `src/components/visits/ActionTypePickerModal.test.tsx`: test that individual_af_teacher_interaction radio button is selectable (not disabled)
Update test: selecting and submitting calls onSubmit('individual_af_teacher_interaction')
Verify: other 7 action types remain disabled
`npm run test` passes
`npm run build` passes
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 3.1. Small change — just add the type to the enabled check.

userStories.title: Individual teacher interaction form component
userStories.description: As a PM, I want a form that lets me add teachers one at a time, record their attendance, and fill out questions for present teachers.
acceptanceCriteria: Create new file `src/components/visits/IndividualAFTeacherInteractionForm.tsx` with 'use client' directive
Props: `{ data, setData, disabled, schoolCode }` (same shape as AFTeamInteractionForm)
Teacher fetch: useEffect fetches from `GET /api/pm/teachers?school_code={schoolCode}`, stores in state (same pattern as AFTeamInteractionForm)
Add Teacher: button + dropdown of remaining teachers (fetched minus recorded); selecting appends new entry with `attendance: 'present'` and empty `questions: {}`

Collapsible sections: each teacher rendered as accordion div (`data-testid='teacher-section-{id}'`) with header (name, attendance badge, question progress, chevron) and expandable content (attendance radios, questions if present, remove button)
Attendance gating: 'present' shows 13 questions from config; 'on_leave'/'absent' shows no questions and clears existing questions
Attendance radios: `data-testid='teacher-{id}-attendance-{value}'`; question radios: `data-testid='teacher-{id}-{questionKey}-yes/no'`; remark: `data-testid='teacher-{id}-{questionKey}-remark'`
Multiple sections can be open simultaneously; newly added teacher's section auto-expands
Remove button (`data-testid='remove-teacher-{id}'`) removes teacher entry (only when !disabled)
Progress bar (`data-testid='individual-teacher-progress'`): 'Recorded: X/Y teachers' with breakdown '{P} present, {L} on leave, {A} absent'
'All teachers recorded' message (`data-testid='all-teachers-recorded'`) shown when all fetched teachers are in data and !disabled
Disabled/read-only mode: sections collapsed by default, expandable to static text, no add/remove/edit controls
Root element: `data-testid='action-renderer-individual_af_teacher_interaction'`
`npx tsc --noEmit` passes
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 3.2. Follow `src/components/visits/AFTeamInteractionForm.tsx` (385 lines) for teacher fetch pattern and `src/lib/teacher-utils.ts` for Teacher interface/getTeacherDisplayName(). Import config from `src/lib/individual-af-teacher-interaction.ts`. This is the most complex component — expect ~400-500 lines.

userStories.title: Form component unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need comprehensive tests for the form component to verify add/edit/remove/collapse interactions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create new file `src/components/visits/IndividualAFTeacherInteractionForm.test.tsx` following `src/components/visits/AFTeamInteractionForm.test.tsx` pattern
Teacher fetch tests (~3): fetches on mount with correct school_code, error state on fetch failure, renders 'Add Teacher' button after fetch

Add teacher + section tests (~6): selecting teacher creates new expanded section, teacher removed from dropdown, section shows attendance radios, on_leave/absent shows no questions, present shows all 13 questions, 'All teachers recorded' message when all teachers in data
Collapsible behavior tests (~4): clicking header toggles expand/collapse, multiple sections open simultaneously, collapsing preserves data, collapsed header shows name + badge + progress

Editing + removing tests (~5): changing attendance present->absent clears questions, present->absent->present shows empty questions, answer change updates data via setData, remove button removes entry, removed teacher reappears in dropdown
Progress bar test (~1): correct recorded/total count and attendance breakdown
Disabled tests (~3): sections collapsed by default, no add/remove buttons, expanding shows static read-only text
Edge cases (~2): teacher in data but not in fetched list shows name from data, empty/null data shows empty state with Add Teacher
All ~24 tests pass: `npx vitest run src/components/visits/IndividualAFTeacherInteractionForm.test.tsx`
`npm run test` — full suite passes
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 3.3. Follow `src/components/visits/AFTeamInteractionForm.test.tsx` (494 lines, 22 tests) for test structure, mocking fetch, and RTL patterns.

userStories.title: Wire form into ActionDetailForm
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the form component wired into the action detail page shell so it renders for the correct action type with proper save/end behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Import `IndividualAFTeacherInteractionForm` and `INDIVIDUAL_AF_TEACHER_INTERACTION_CONFIG` in `src/components/visits/ActionDetailForm.tsx`
Add constant: `const INDIVIDUAL_TEACHER_ACTION_TYPE = 'individual_af_teacher_interaction' as const`
Add `INDIVIDUAL_TEACHER_ACTION_TYPE` to `SAVE_BEFORE_END_TYPES` Set
Add `sanitizeIndividualTeacherPayload(data)` — strip unknown keys, validate entry structure, keep only known question keys from config
Add `bootstrapIndividualTeacherPayload(data)` — return `{ teachers: [] }` for null/undefined, else delegate to sanitize
Update `normalizeFormDataForAction()` — add branch for individual teacher BEFORE the `!isPlainObject(data)` guard
Update `sanitizePatchData()` — add branch for individual teacher
Update render chain: insert IndividualAFTeacherInteractionForm between AF team interaction check and fallback `config.fields.map(...)`

Update END 422 error message: 3-way ternary — classroom observation message, individual teacher message ('Please complete all required fields and record all teachers before ending this interaction.'), AF team default message
`npx tsc --noEmit` passes
Existing action detail page tests pass: `npx vitest run src/app/visits/\[id\]/actions/\[actionId\]/page.test.tsx`
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 3.4. The ActionDetailForm.tsx is 877 lines. Follow the exact same pattern used for AF team interaction integration. CRITICAL: place the new render branch BETWEEN AF team check and fallback, not after fallback.

userStories.title: Action card stats
userStories.description: As a PM, I want to see teacher count and attendance breakdown on the action card so I can quickly assess progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Import `INDIVIDUAL_AF_TEACHER_INTERACTION_CONFIG` in `src/components/visits/ActionPointList.tsx`
Define and export `IndividualTeacherInteractionStats` interface: `{ recordedCount, presentCount, onLeaveCount, absentCount }`
Add and export `getIndividualTeacherInteractionStats(data)` — return null if empty/no teachers, else count by attendance type
Render stats on individual teacher interaction cards: 'Teachers: {X} ({P} present, {L} leave, {A} absent)' with `data-testid='individual-teacher-stats-{action.id}'`

Add ~8 new tests to `src/components/visits/ActionPointList.test.tsx`: stats render with recorded teachers, attendance breakdown correct, nothing shown for empty/undefined data, standalone stats unit tests for null cases and counting logic
`npm run test` passes
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 3.5. Follow the existing AF team interaction stats pattern in the same file.

userStories.title: Action detail page tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need action detail page tests to verify form dispatch, bootstrapping, and error messages for the new action type.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ~5 new tests to `src/app/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/page.test.tsx`
Test: loads the Individual AF Teacher Interaction renderer for the action type
Test: bootstraps null data to `{ teachers: [] }`
Test: auto-saves data before calling `/end` (save-before-end pattern)
Test: shows save failure details with type-specific message
Test: shows END 422 guidance with type-specific message mentioning 'record all teachers'
All tests pass: `npm run test`
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 3.6. Follow existing test patterns in the file for classroom observation and AF team interaction.

userStories.title: E2E test infrastructure — data builders and teacher seeding
userStories.description: As a developer, I need E2E helpers for seeding deterministic teacher data and building valid payloads.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `buildCompleteIndividualTeacherInteractionData(teacherIds?)` to `e2e/helpers/db.ts` — generates strict-valid payload with attendance 'present' and all 13 questions answered with `{ answer: true }`

Add `seedIndividualTeacherTestTeachers(pool, schoolCode)` to `e2e/helpers/db.ts` — upserts 3 deterministic teacher user_permission rows using INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE, cleans up other teacher rows for the school code
Add `fillIndividualTeacherInteractionForm(page)` helper to `e2e/tests/visits.spec.ts` — selects first teacher from dropdown, selects Present, answers all 13 questions with Yes
Verify returned payload passes strict validation
`npx tsc --noEmit` passes
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 4.1-4.2. Follow existing `seedTestVisit()`/`seedVisitAction()` patterns in `e2e/helpers/db.ts`. Teacher seeding must be idempotent against dump data.

userStories.title: E2E test scenarios
userStories.description: As a developer, I need E2E tests covering the full lifecycle, validation edge cases, and updated completion rules.
acceptanceCriteria: Test 1: PM creates, starts, fills, and ends individual teacher interaction (full lifecycle with form filling)
Test 2: END blocked when not all teachers recorded — seed partial data, assert 422 error about missing teachers
Test 3: Absent/on-leave teachers recorded without questions — verify no questions shown, teacher recorded, END succeeds when all teachers done
Test 4: Visit completion requires all 3 action types — missing individual teacher yields 422
Test 5: Visit completes with all 3 completed action types — 200
Test 6: Program admin can view individual teacher interaction but not interact (read-only)

Update existing E2E completion tests to seed all 3 action types (specifically: `complete-blocked-without-rubric-valid-completed-classroom-observation` and `admin-can-complete-other-pm-visit-with-same-rules`)
All E2E tests pass: `npm run test:e2e`
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 4.3. Use seedIndividualTeacherTestTeachers() in beforeAll for deterministic teacher lists. Use buildCompleteIndividualTeacherInteractionData() and buildCompleteAFTeamInteractionData() for seeding completed actions.

userStories.title: Documentation updates
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all documentation updated to reflect the new action type and visit completion rule change.
acceptanceCriteria: Update `CLAUDE.md`: add Individual AF Teacher Interaction section (config, validation, form, payload), remove 'Visit completion does NOT require AF team interaction — only classroom_observation is required' (~line 118), replace with new 3-type rule, update test counts

Update `docs/ai/project-context.md`: add individual teacher interaction section under §3.5, update enabled types 2->3 (~line 196), remove 'AF team interaction is supplementary — not required for visit completion' (~line 154), update 'COMPLETE visit: does NOT require AF team interaction' (~line 184), update test counts (~lines 452, 475)
Annotate `docs/ai/af-team-interaction/2026-03-05-af-team-interaction-implementation-plan.md` (~lines 313, 377, 904): mark 'supplementary' and 'not required' statements as superseded
Annotate `ralph/archive/2026-03-06-af-team-interaction/prd-af-team-interaction.md` (~lines 16, 67, 238): mark FR-8 and related statements as superseded
Update test name in `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/complete/route.test.ts` (~line 362) that says 'AF team interaction is supplementary'
Update action type counts: 9->10, enabled: 2->3 in all docs
Update auto-memory `MEMORY.md` with new unit test and E2E test counts
userStories.notes: Reference implementation plan Phase 5. Be thorough — the old 'only classroom observation required' rule appears in multiple files. All must be updated.

userStories.title: Final review
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to review all changes made during this feature implementation to ensure nothing was missed and document the results.
acceptanceCriteria: Use explore agents to understand the current state of all modified and new files
Review git diff to see all changes made across the branch
Verify no unintended side effects or missing pieces
Run full verification: `npx tsc --noEmit` (zero errors), `npm run test` (all pass), `npm run test:e2e` (all pass), `npm run lint`
Create `ralph/individual-af-teacher-interaction-review.txt` with concise findings (under 50 lines)
Review file summarizes: what was done, files changed, new/updated test counts, any concerns or recommendations
userStories.notes: This is the final quality gate. Reference the implementation plan's Phase 6 verification checklist.
